itemListExamples.description: Example 1: Dictator's Performance Props - Equipment items for performances

field.label: Performance Props & Instruments
field.hint: Select the equipment you use in your performances (musical instruments, props, costumes, etc.)

itemListExamples.description: Example 2: Dictator's Signature Spells - Spells learned through advancement

field.label: Signature Spells
field.hint: Spells you've learned through the Signature Piece advancement or other means

itemListExamples.description: Example 3: Neo's Gifts of the Fair - Gift items from The Fair

field.label: Gifts of the Fair
field.hint: The gifts you've received from The Fair (starting gifts and those gained through advancement)

itemListExamples.description: Example 4: Godbinder's Pantheon - Gods the character worships

field.label: Your Pantheon
field.hint: The gods you worship and can draw power from

itemListExamples.description: Example 5: Emotion Knight's Known Stances - Combat/social/emotion stances

field.label: Known Stances
field.hint: The stances you've learned (starting stances plus those gained through advancement)

itemListExamples.description: Example 6: Emotion Knight's Venting Techniques - Venting abilities

field.label: Venting Techniques
field.hint: The venting techniques you've mastered for releasing emotional energy

itemListExamples.description: Example 7: Character's Available Looks - Appearance options from paragon

field.label: Available Looks
field.hint: Appearance and clothing options provided by your paragon class

itemListExamples.description: Example 8: Master's Apprentices (using equipment for NPCs) - Example of creative use

field.label: Your Apprentices
field.hint: Track your apprentices as special equipment items (or create a custom item type for this)

realWorldExample.description: REAL EXAMPLE: Neo's class abilities with Gifts itemList

fields.label: Fair Gold
fields.hint: The amount of Fair Gold you currently possess

fields.label: Gifts of the Fair
fields.hint: Your gifts from The Fair. You start with 2 gifts and can gain more through advancement.

fields.label: Special Feature
fields.hint: What makes this ride special? (e.g., 'Can transform', 'Never runs out of fuel', 'Sentient')

availableItemTypes: gift - Gifts of the Fair (for Neo)
arcaneweapon - The Arcane Weapon (for Emotion Knight)
paragon - Paragon classes (probably not useful in abilities)
behavior: itemList fields display all items of the specified type from the character's inventory
Players can check/uncheck items to select which ones are associated with this field
Includes create/edit/delete buttons for managing items directly from the character sheet
Expandable item details show description, specials, and type-specific properties
Initial value is always an empty array []
Selected items are stored as an array of UUIDs in character data
whenToUse: When a class ability grants or tracks specific items
When advancement choices involve selecting from owned items
When you want players to manage a subset of their inventory (e.g., 'attuned items', 'prepared spells')
When a paragon has a fixed number of specific item types (Neo's 2 starting gifts, Godbinder's gods)
